files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.AutoFilterCustomFilterCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of auto filter custom filter objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.AutoFilterSortConditionCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of auto filter sort condition objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.AutoShapeType
files.Summary: Specifies the type of an auto shape (preset geometry).

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Cell
files.Summary: Represents a single worksheet cell and exposes value, formula, and style operations.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Cells
files.Summary: Provides access to worksheet cells, rows, columns, and merged ranges.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.CellsException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during cells.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Chart
files.Summary: Represents a chart embedded in a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ChartCollection
files.Summary: Represents collection of charts on a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ColumnCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of column objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Comment
files.Summary: Represents a worksheet comment (legacy note) anchored to a single cell.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.CommentCollection
files.Summary: Represents the collection of comments (legacy notes) on a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ConditionalFormattingCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of conditional formatting objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.DefinedNameCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of defined name objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.FilterColumnCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of filter column objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.FilterValueCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of filter value objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.FormatConditionCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of format condition objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.FormulaException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during formula.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.HyperlinkCollection
files.Summary: Encapsulates the hyperlinks defined for a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.IWarningCallback
files.Summary: Defines a callback that receives load warnings.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ImageType
files.Summary: Represents the format of an image stored in a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.InvalidFileFormatException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during invalid file format.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ListColumn
files.Summary: Represents a single column in an Excel table.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ListColumnCollection
files.Summary: Represents the ordered collection of columns in an Excel table.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ListObject
files.Summary: Represents an Excel table (structured reference / ListObject).

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ListObjectCollection
files.Summary: Represents the collection of Excel tables on a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.LoadOptions
files.Summary: Specifies how a workbook should be loaded.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.PageSetup
files.Summary: Represents worksheet print and page-layout settings.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Picture
files.Summary: Represents a picture (image) anchored to a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.PictureCollection
files.Summary: Represents collection of pictures anchored to a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.RowCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of row objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.SaveOptions
files.Summary: Specifies how a workbook should be saved.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Shape
files.Summary: Represents a drawing object (auto shape) anchored to a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ShapeCollection
files.Summary: Represents collection of drawing objects (shapes) on a worksheet.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Style
files.Summary: Represents a mutable cell style facade that can be applied to one or more cells.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.StyleException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during style.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.StyleFlag
files.Summary: Represents flags which indicate applied formatting properties.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.TableStyleType
files.Summary: Represents the built-in Excel table style types.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.TotalsCalculation
files.Summary: Represents the aggregation function shown in a table totals row cell.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.UnsupportedFeatureException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during unsupported feature.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.ValidationCollection
files.Summary: Represents a collection of validation objects.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Workbook
files.Summary: Represents the root spreadsheet object used to create, load, modify, and save an XLSX workbook.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.WorkbookLoadException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during workbook load.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.WorkbookSaveException
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurs during workbook save.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.WorkbookSettings
files.Summary: Represents workbook-level settings that affect date handling and display formatting.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Worksheet
files.Summary: Encapsulates a single worksheet and its supported v0.1 worksheet features.

files.Title: Aspose.Cells_FOSS.WorksheetCollection
files.Summary: Encapsulates the workbook's worksheets and active-sheet state.
